title: A private conversation
question: 把今天课文的情绪、放进你自己最近一次类似的经历——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景的空都填上、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: 老师上周备课的时候，邻居家小孩在外面一直尖叫，[EN]I got very angry[/EN]，但 [EN]I did not say anything[/EN]——你呢？

options.label: A
options.english_template: At home, my mom called me to dinner when I was playing a game. I got very angry, but I ___ to her.

options.label: B
options.english_template: My classmate kept asking me questions when I was taking a test. I got very angry, and I ___ to him.

options.label: C
options.english_template: My neighbors were ___ in the morning, and I could not sleep.
